elements.original_description: A person holding a magnifying glass over a glowing credit report with graphs and numbers. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: High-quality photograph of a person holding a magnifying glass over a glowing credit report with graphs and numbers. The credit report radiates a soft, digital glow, showing abstract charts and data visualizations. The magnifying glass is clean and reflective. The background is neutral and uncluttered. Cinematic lighting with a focused beam on the report and subtle lens flare for intrigue. Professional composition, sharp focus, high resolution, with no text, letters, numbers, or watermarks.
